spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates navigator.subApps.add() with multiple manifests for batch installation.

interactive.rationale: Button triggers real subApps.add() call with status feedback.

edge_cases.rationale: Could show partial failure handling when some sub-apps fail to install.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested: batch-install interaction works with proper fallback. No console errors.

openQuestions.title: Add partial-failure handling
openQuestions.detail: The batch install should demonstrate what happens when some sub-apps succeed and others fail.
